prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 电子信息/通信类专业社会热度高热推荐，数字经济为新兴热门方向；辽宁省2026年普通高考总人数约20万，物理类考生 估算约14.3万人（较2025年14.34万略降约0.3%），竞争略有缓解。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年基准位次9443名、2026年大幅 缩招40%使竞争急剧加剧、物理类考生略降0.3%使竞争微降、声誉偏负面抑制报考热度、新增数字经济专业可能吸引部分考生等因素，缩招效应远大于其他因素，预计2026年最低 录取位次较2025年大幅前移；预测最低位次约7147名，区间6647–7647名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for Physics Category were approximately 2751 → 3171 → 4714 → 8002 → 9443, showing a continuous and significant downward trend. Over the past 3 years, the cumulative decline is about 6272 places, with an average annual decline of about 2090 places. The baseline ranking for 2025 is about 9443. The enrollment plan for Physics Category in Liaoning Province was 6 in 2021, 7 in 2022, 6 in 2023, 6 in 2024, and 5 in 2025. The 2026 plan is only 3, a sharp reduction of 40% compared to 2025, which significantly intensifies competition and tends to greatly decrease the ranking number.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Beijing Foreign Studies University is a 211 Project and Double First-Class university. In the 2026 Soft Science Chinese University Rankings, it is approximately 79th, with a stable and slightly rising trend in recent years. It holds a top-tier position among language universities nationwide. In 2026, its reputation evaluation is somewhat negative, involving academic misconduct and teacher ethics controversies. Its Douyin popularity is relatively high (ranked 39th out of 106 overall), with moderate to high short video exposure. In 2023, there was an abnormal admission record where the admission rankings for minor language majors dropped, which has a lagging psychological impact on applicants. Foreign Language and Literature is an A+ discipline (top nationally), highly corresponding to the French and English joint training majors in Physics Category. The newly added Digital Economy major is an emerging interdisciplinary direction.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Electronic Information/Communication majors are highly recommended in society, and Digital Economy is an emerging hot direction. In 2026, the total number of candidates for the Liaoning Province Gaokao is about 200,000, with Physics Category candidates estimated at about 143,000 (a slight decrease of about 0.3% from 2025's 143,400), slightly easing competition.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 9443, the sharp 40% reduction in enrollment in 2026 drastically intensifies competition, the slight 0.3% decrease in Physics Category candidates slightly reduces competition, the negative reputation suppresses application enthusiasm, and the new Digital Economy major may attract some candidates, the enrollment reduction effect far outweighs other factors. It is expected that the minimum admission ranking in 2026 will significantly move forward compared to 2025. The predicted minimum ranking is about 7147, with a range of 6647–7647.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range of 6647–7647, and Physics Category has very few admission majors (only 3), it is recommended to choose Tier 2 Digital Economy as a safe option, and Tier 1 French and English joint training majors as reach choices. Due to the sharp reduction in Physics Category enrollment to only 3 in 2026, competition is extremely fierce, and a ranking significantly above the upper limit of the range (7647) is needed for a higher chance.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for History Category were approximately 411 → 503 → 868 → 731 → 824, showing a fluctuating and backward trend overall. After reaching a high of 868 in 2023, it slightly recovered to 731 in 2024, then moved back to 824 in 2025. The fluctuation range in the past three years is about 731–868, with a baseline ranking of approximately 824 in 2025. The enrollment plan for this university in Liaoning Province's History Category was 6 in 2021, 8 in 2022, 11 in 2023, 11 in 2024, and 9 in 2025. The 2026 plan is 10, a slight expansion of about 11% compared to 2025, which eases competitive pressure and tends to increase the ranking number.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Beijing Foreign Studies University is a 211 Project and Double First-Class university. In the 2026 Soft Science China University Ranking, it is approximately 79th, with a steady upward trend in recent years (82nd in 2021 → 79th in 2026). It holds a top-tier position among language universities nationwide. In 2026, its reputation is somewhat negative, involving incidents related to a postgraduate entrance exam celebrity's academic fraud and teacher ethics controversies. Its Douyin popularity is relatively high (39th out of 106 overall), with moderate to high short video exposure. In 2023, there was an abnormal admission record where rankings for some minor language majors dropped significantly, which has a lagging effect on application psychology. Foreign Language and Literature is an A+ discipline (top nationally), closely aligned with the university's English, Japanese, Russian, Spanish, and other admission majors, and its academic strength continues to attract high-scoring students.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: The social popularity of foreign language majors in 2024 is assessed as generally lukewarm, with an overall stable but slightly cool trend. In 2026, the total number of regular college entrance exam takers in Liaoning Province is about 200,000, with an estimated 57,000 History Category examinees (a slight increase of about 1.2% from 56,300 in 2025), indicating a slight intensification of competition and reflecting an overall increase in competitive intensity.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering factors such as the 2025 baseline ranking of 824, an enrollment expansion of about 11% in 2026 easing competition, a slight increase of about 1.2% in History Category examinees slightly intensifying competition, a negative reputation suppressing application enthusiasm, and stable popularity of foreign language majors, the expansion effect slightly outweighs the increase in examinees. It is predicted that the minimum admission ranking in 2026 will move backward slightly compared to 2025. The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 894, with a range of 733–1055.
